composition.Programmer 1:
Fix and enhance the backend code in main.py for the 'SmartHomeManager' web application. 
- Ensure all Flask routes correctly render the HTML templates.
- Resolve the TemplateNotFound error by configuring Flask to locate the templates directory properly.
- Verify that the backend supports all required pages and their data interactions as per the original task.
- Maintain the existing logic for reading and writing data from local text files under the 'data' directory with pipe-delimited format.
- Coordinate with frontend developers by ensuring the backend routes match the URLs used in frontend code.
composition.Programmer 2:
Fix and organize all frontend HTML template files (dashboard.html, device_list.html, add_device.html, automation_rules.html, energy_report.html, activity_logs.html).
- Ensure all these HTML files are saved inside a 'templates' directory at the root level of the project, alongside main.py, so Flask can locate and render them properly.
- Verify that all URLs in the frontend code use Flask route URLs (not direct HTML file names) as per the original task.
- Confirm that each page includes all specified elements with correct IDs and page titles as per the original requirements.
- Coordinate with Programmer 1 to ensure frontend URLs correspond to backend routes.
